design_philosophy.core_aesthetic: Glassmorphism, Grainy Gradients, Thin Grid Lines, Kinetic Typography
design_philosophy.key_principle: Advertising at the Speed of Thought

layout_strategy.mobile_nav: Fixed bottom navigation, thumb-friendly, glassmorphism backdrop

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md
buttons.glow: relative overflow-hidden group bg-transparent border border-cyan-500/50 text-cyan-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-cyan-500/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] transition-all

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden

visual_enhancers.custom_cursor: fixed w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full mix-blend-difference pointer-events-none z-50 transition-transform duration-200 ease-out data-[hover=true]:scale-[4]

hero.headline: ADVERTISING AT THE SPEED OF THOUGHT.
hero.subheadline: The first AI-native platform that predicts consumer desire before it happens.
hero.layout: Split screen: Kinetic Typography (Left) vs 3D Abstract Animation (Right)
hero.animation: Staggered reveal for text, continuous float/rotate for 3D element

footer.newsletter: Minimalist input field with 'Subscribe' arrow button.
footer.social_ticker: Infinite horizontal scroll of network partner logos/stats.

icons.instruction: Use Lucide icons with thin stroke width (1.5px) for elegance.

transitions.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.8 }}
transitions.text_reveal: initial={{ y: 20, opacity: 0 }} whileInView={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

motion.3d_implementation: Use framer-motion 'motion.svg' and 'motion.path' for the Hero animation. Create a complex, rotating geometric wireframe using SVG paths that draw themselves (pathLength animation).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Force dark mode in Tailwind config. Set background to #121212.
3. Fonts: Add Space Grotesk and Exo 2 to index.css via Google Fonts import.
4. Cursor: Implement the custom cursor logic in a top-level component. It should blend-difference with the background.
5. Hero: Build the kinetic typography. Text should feel HUGE. The 3D element on the right should be a custom SVG component using Framer Motion to rotate/draw lines.
6. Grid: Use the 'Thin Grid Lines' background pattern defined in visual_enhancers globally or on the Hero section.
7. Mobile Nav: Create a fixed bottom bar for mobile with glassmorphism. Hide the top nav on mobile.
8. Testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
- Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
- Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
- Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
- You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
- You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
- Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
- NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
- Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
- Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
- Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
